# Project: Tic-tac-toe Game

A Java desktop application for playing Tic-tac-toe (Noughts and Crosses) with both player vs player and player vs computer modes.

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Java desktop application using Swing
  - Game modes: 1 vs 1 (human players) and 1 vs computer
  - GUI interface for game interaction

- [ ] Customize the Project

- [ ] Compile the Project

- [ ] Launch the Project
